LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO DEFENDANT BRANDWIZARD LLC'S DEMURRER TO UNVERIFIED FIRST COMPLAINT FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT BRANDWIZARD LLC'S DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR TO ENABLE COUNSEL TO COMPLY WITH CCP 430.41. BRANDWIZARD'S TIME TO FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING IS EXTENDED TO JULY 15, 2018. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. (302/RBU)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-21-2018 HEARING ON DEFENDANT BRANDWIZARD LLC'S DEMURRER TO THE SOLE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT IN THE COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTOMATED MEDIA PROCESSING SOLUTIONS, INC., THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND OVERRULED THE DEMURRER ORDER SIGNED. (SEE ORDER FOR FULL DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, EMAIL: TORREANOM@AOL.COM. (302/HEK)

No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Jul-09-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. **NOTE: This case is subject to dismissal pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) and counsel will be reported to the State Bar as required by Business and Professions Code 6086.7(a)(3) if there is no appearance on the next hearing date and compliance.** Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2018 Continued To Jan-29-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JAN-29-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-23-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant Brandwizard LLC's demurrer to the sole cause of action for breach of contract in the complaint filed by plaintiff Automated Media Processing Solutions, Inc. is overruled. Automated has sufficiently alleged a viable claim for breach of written contract seeking specified damages for nonpayment of a contract sum. Contrary to Brandwizard's memoranda, nothing in the complaint states or suggests that Brandwizard did not breach the alleged contract. Order signed. (see order for full details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-13-2018 Continued To Sep-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-15-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BRANDWIZARD LLC's DEMURRER TO UNVERIFIED FIRST COMPLAINT FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT.

Defendant Brandwizard LLC's demurrer is ordered OFF CALENDAR to enable counsel to comply with CCP 430.41. Brandwizard's time to file a responsive pleading is extended to July 15, 2018.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
